title: DönerPvP
description: Its a Pvp Rescourcen pack with Kebab Background and Kebab style
body:
Döner Kebab PvP Resource Pack

Turn your Minecraft PvP experience into something fresh and unique with a bold döner-inspired style. This pack brings a fun mix of clean visuals and themed design, making fights feel more intense while keeping everything easy to see and use.

The textures are designed with PvP in mind — simple, clear, and distraction-free — while still adding a distinctive vibe that stands out from typical packs. Expect a consistent style across the UI and in-game elements, all built to feel smooth and responsive during combat.

Whether you're grinding PvP or just want something different, this pack delivers a clean experience with a creative twist.

Features:

Unique themed design
Clean and PvP-friendly visuals
Easy-to-see items and UI
Lightweight and smooth performance
